briefs.title: Council to vote on $3.8M security system upgrade for Burnaby city facilities
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on awarding a $3.8 million contract to Paladin Technologies Inc. to upgrade, install, and maintain security cameras (CCTV) and door access control systems across city facilities over five years (2026–2031).
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — this contract may create opportunities for local security or tech subcontractors.
